title: euodia malayana
intro: Euodia malayana, also known as the Malay euodia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Euodia malayana include its ability to alleviate fever, relieve pain, and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for various ailments such as rheumatism and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
